creator: horance@swarm.ie.cycu.edu.tw
text:
A bug in "ltconfig", which will disable building shared
	libraries in ports/devel/libffi under 4.0-CURRENT

Fix: apply this patch to ports/devel/libffi:
==============================================================
How-To-Repeat: 
	
	cd ${PORTSDIR}/devel/libffi
	make package
